hero.badge: Iyavikela imindeni yaseNingizimu Afrika · Mahala kucala
hero.headline: Mntfwana wakho uphephile ku-inthanethi. Siqinisekile ngaloko.
hero.subheadline: Kuphela kwendzandza yekuphepha yedijithali leyakhelwe imindeni yaseNingizimu Afrika. Ibeka liliso ku-WhatsApp. Ikhuluma siZulu. Ilungele emumitini lengu-5.
hero.trust: Iyahambisana ne-POPIA · Akukho likhadi lesikweletu lolidingekako · Khansela noma nini

problem.title: Toni letakuphepha temhlaba tonkhe takhelwe bona. Hhayi wena.
problem.p1: Mntfwana wakho uhlala ku-WhatsApp. Hhayi iMessage. Hhayi i-Snapchat.
problem.p2: Bark ibita R260 ngenyanga futsi ayibeki liliso ku-WhatsApp. Qustodio ayikhulumi siBhunu. Google Family Link ingacanyulwa emumitwseni lengu-30.
problem.p3: SafeNet SA yakhelwe eSoweto, eStellenbosch, ePolokwane, nasemndenini wonkhe lophakathi.

howItWorks.label: SafeNet SA Isebenta Kanjani
howItWorks.headline: Yilungise emumitini lengu-5. Kuvikeleka lokuhlala.
howItWorks.step1: Download bese ungena ngenombolo yakho ye-SA. Akunasiphashamisi lesidzingekako.
howItWorks.step2: Skhena ikhodi ye-QR kulucingingo lwemntfwana wakho. Imizuzwana lengu-60.
howItWorks.step3: Luna AI ibeka liliso ngemuva nje. Tixwayiso ngelulwimi lwakho.

features.headline: Konkhe lokumdingako umzalati waseNingizimu Afrika
features.whatsapp: Kubekwa kweliso ku-WhatsApp. Kulucingingo lwemntfwana wakho. Kuyimfihlo.
features.whatsappDesc: Kuphela kwendzandza levisa tingoti ta-WhatsApp ngesiZulu, siBhunu, siSuthu nesiXhosa. Akudluliselwa. Kuphephile ku-POPIA.

cta.headline: 3.2 tigidzi temindeni yaseNingizimu Afrika iyakudzinga loku. Owakho ngumunye wayo.
cta.sub: Calekela kuvikela umndeni wakho namuhla. Mahala kwilinga. Iyahambisana ne-POPIA. Ilungele emumitini lengu-5.

footer.description: Ingqalasizinda yekuphepha yedijithali yemindeni yaseNingizimu Afrika. Italwe lapha. Yakhelwe lapha.

auth.phonePrompt: Faka inombolo yakho yaseNingizimu Afrika ku cala
auth.verifyHint: Faka ikhodi yetinombolo leti-6 letitfunyelwe ku-+27
auth.consentDesc: Ngaphansi kweMtsetfo wekuVikeleka kwelwati Lomuntfu waseNingizimu Afrika, sidzinga imvumo yakho kuloku lokulandzelako:
